name: @centraid/automation
description: Centraid automation engine — manifest, fire spine + OpenDispatch seam, the Host interface + in-process scheduler, webhook ingress, the worker-thread handler runner, and app scaffolding. Backend-agnostic: execution and scheduling are injected callbacks, so it depends on @centraid/app-engine but never on any agent backend. Consumers import it namespaced (`import * as automation`).
